outages.headline: CPC suspends new Kaohsiung LSMGO nominations amid tight barge schedule
outages.summary: State-owned bunker supplier CPC Corporation (CPC) has temporarily stopped accepting new LSMGO nominations for deliveries at Taiwan’s Kaohsiung port due to a tight barge schedule. LSMGO deliveries have been suspended since last Friday and will remain on hold until CPC clears its backlog of pending orders, according to a source. The disruption has also affected ...

outages.headline: Gasoline margins ease near four-year high as Houthis blockade
outages.summary: Northwest European gasoline refining margins decreased by approximately $1 to reach $44.43 per barrel on Monday. The margins remained close to a four-year high as Yemen’s Houthis declared a blockade on Saudi Arabia, creating potential supply disruptions through the Red Sea. Trading activity on Argus showed 6,000 tons of Eurobob E5 barges changed hands, with ...

outages.headline: Geopolitical Disruption Reduces Cargo Volume at Port of Antwerp
